titles.title: Lord, Make Me a Doer of Your Word

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I see a world full of preachers and singers, But very little doers of your word. I see a world full of churches and members, But very little doers of your word.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I see a church full of prophets and apostles, But very little doers of your word. Lord, how long will your people suffer, Come and fill us with the fullness of your word.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Lord, make me a doer of your word, Lord, make me a keeper of your word, Lord, make me a doer of your word, Not just a singer, but a doer of your word, Not a church member, but a doer of your word.
